debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∀ (n : ℕ), 2 ≤ n → ∃ x y z, 4 * x * y * z = n * (x * y + x * z + y * z)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
fun n hn => ⟨1, 1, (n - 2) / 2, by
    have h₁ : 2 ≤ n := hn
    have h₂ : 4 * 1 * 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) = n * (1 * 1 + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
      have h₃ : n % 2 = 0 ∨ n % 2 = 1 := by omega
      cases h₃ with
      | inl h₃ =>
        -- Case: n is even
        have h₄ : n % 2 = 0 := h₃
        have h₅ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 2 := by
          have h₆ : 2 ≤ n := hn
          have h₇ : n % 2 = 0 := h₄
          have h₈ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 2 := by
            have h₉ : n - 2 = 2 * ((n - 2) / 2) := by
              have h₁₀ := Nat.mod_add_div n 2
              omega
            omega
          exact h₈
        have h₆ : 4 * 1 * 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) = 4 * ((n - 2) / 2) := by ring
        have h₇ : n * (1 * 1 + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2)) = n * (1 + 2 * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          ring
        rw [h₆, h₇]
        have h₈ : n * (1 + 2 * ((n - 2) / 2)) = n + 2 * (n * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          ring
        rw [h₈]
        have h₉ : 4 * ((n - 2) / 2) = n + 2 * (n * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          have h₁₀ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 2 := h₅
          have h₁₁ : 2 ≤ n := hn
          cases n with
          | zero => omega
          | succ n =>
            cases n with
            | zero => omega
            | succ n =>
              simp [h₄, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, Nat.add_assoc] at h₁₀ ⊢
              <;> ring_nf at h₁₀ ⊢ <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    nlinarith
                  }) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    simp_all [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
                    <;> ring_nf at *
                    <;> omega
                  })
        linarith
      | inr h₃ =>
        -- Case: n is odd
        have h₄ : n % 2 = 1 := h₃
        have h₅ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 3 := by
          have h₆ : 2 ≤ n := hn
          have h₇ : n % 2 = 1 := h₄
          have h₈ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 3 := by
            have h₉ : n - 2 = 2 * ((n - 3) / 2) + 1 := by
              have h₁₀ := Nat.mod_add_div n 2
              omega
            have h₁₀ : (n - 2) / 2 = (n - 3) / 2 := by
              omega
            omega
          exact h₈
        have h₆ : 4 * 1 * 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) = 4 * ((n - 2) / 2) := by ring
        have h₇ : n * (1 * 1 + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2) + 1 * ((n - 2) / 2)) = n * (1 + 2 * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          ring
        rw [h₆, h₇]
        have h₈ : n * (1 + 2 * ((n - 2) / 2)) = n + 2 * (n * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          ring
        rw [h₈]
        have h₉ : 4 * ((n - 2) / 2) = n + 2 * (n * ((n - 2) / 2)) := by
          have h₁₀ : (n - 2) / 2 * 2 = n - 3 := h₅
          have h₁₁ : 2 ≤ n := hn
          cases n with
          | zero => omega
          | succ n =>
            cases n with
            | zero => omega
            | succ n =>
              simp [h₄, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, Nat.add_assoc] at h₁₀ ⊢
              <;> ring_nf at h₁₀ ⊢ <;>
                (try omega) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    nlinarith
                  }) <;>
                (try
                  {
                    simp_all [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
                    <;> ring_nf at *
                    <;> omega
                  })
        linarith
    exact h₂
  ⟩
